Panel navigation model.question: How should Phase 2 and Phase 3 panels coexist?
Active-tab state ownership + persistence?
Panel navigation model.answer: useState in AppShell, resets on new drop
options_presented: useState in AppShell, reset on new drop

Per-animation data & row granularity.question: How should per-animation peak data be computed?
Per-animation data & row granularity.answer: Extend sampler to emit both globalPeaks + perAnimation

Per-animation data & row granularity.question: Row granularity within a card?
Per-animation data & row granularity.answer: Dedupe by attachment name (matches Phase 2 gap-fix B)

Per-animation data & row granularity.question: Row column set?
Per-animation data & row granularity.answer: Full set: Attachment | Bone Path | Source W×H | Scale | Peak W×H | Frame | [Override]

Per-animation data & row granularity.question: Default row sort within a card?
User clarification: per-animation cards show only attachment-affected rows. Correct?
Per-animation data & row granularity.answer: Confirmed. Affected = scale-delta >1e-6 OR AttachmentTimeline names attachment.
options_presented: Conservative: any timeline touching slot/bone chain

Setup Pose + empty-state semantics.question: Setup Pose top card contents?
Setup Pose + empty-state semantics.answer: All attachments at their setup-pose peak

Setup Pose + empty-state semantics.question: Setup Pose card uses same rules as animation cards?
Setup Pose + empty-state semantics.answer: Yes — same dedupe/columns/Scale-DESC sort. Frame = '—' em dash; Scale column shows setup-pose scale (e.g., SQUARE2 = 2.000× pre-scaled bone).

Setup Pose + empty-state semantics.question: 'No assets referenced' trigger?
Setup Pose + empty-state semantics.answer: Animation whose affected set (scale-delta OR AttachmentTimeline) is empty renders this state inside its card.
